hubSubtitle: Pick a ready sheet, create a custom one, or get system recommendations based on your child's practice.
hubIntro: Every worksheet opens in preview before printing. An optional answer key is available for your convenience.
answerKeySeparate: Separate answer key — created only when you request it
inkSaveHint: Best for black-and-white printing with less ink
noAnswersInWorksheet: No answers on the worksheet page
blockedAudio: This question requires audio and cannot be printed
blockedImage: This question requires an image and cannot be printed
preferMcqHint: When available in the bank, show choice options
preferMcqUnavailable: No multiple-choice questions available for this topic
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
noStudents: No children linked to this account.
recommendationsEmpty: After a bit more practice we can suggest worksheets tailored to your child.
recommendationsHint: Suggestions are based on topics your child practiced recently — not the parent report.
readyEmptyText: Try changing the filters — or choose all subjects, grades, and levels.
createHint: Choose subject, grade, topic, and level — then create a sheet ready to print.
mixedTopicsHint: Check the topics to include in mixed practice. All topics are selected by default.
mixedTopicsEmptyError: Select at least one topic for mixed practice.
noPreviewData: No worksheet to preview. Go back and create one.
refreshQuestionsError: Could not generate new questions. Please try again.
answerKeyStale: The answer key was updated for the current questions. Open the answer key again.
publicDemoHint: A short demo with 8 exercises — pick subject, grade, and topic.
publicDemoLockedTopic: More topics available in the full parent portal
publicReadyHint: 30 ready worksheets — filter, preview, print, and check with an answer key.
publicPreviewLost: Preview data is unavailable. Return to the worksheets page and choose a sheet again.
publicFullSystemNote: In the full parent portal you can create unlimited worksheets, pick every available topic, and generate fresh sheets each time.
emptyCatalog: No ready worksheets for this filter yet.
writingCreateHint: Choose a category, practice type, and number of lines — then create a sheet ready to print.
writingPublicDemoHint: A short demo — pick a ready template and create a sample sheet.
writingLockedText: This writing practice sheet is available to parents in LEO KIDS. Sign up or log in to access the full writing catalog.
writingReadyHint: Ready writing sheets — 25 public samples, more in the full parent portal.
coloringCreateHint: Pick a picture, then click "Open & print" — an A4 sheet opens in preview.
coloringCreateHintSub: Print directly from the preview window, or close it and pick another card.
coloringUploadTitle: Create a coloring sheet from a photo
coloringUploadHint: Your photo is sent securely to an external processing service to create the coloring sheet only. It is not stored on LEO KIDS servers.
coloringUploadTechNote: The system uses AI to create a clean, clear coloring sheet.
coloringUploadPrivacyBody: Your photo is sent securely to an external processing service to create the coloring sheet only. It is not stored on LEO KIDS servers.
coloringUploadDropzone: Drag a photo here or click to choose
coloringUploadProcessing: Processing… please stay on this page
coloringUploadStayOnPage: Please stay on this page while processing.
coloringUploadUnsupported: Your browser does not support this tool. Try a recent Chrome, Edge, or Safari.
coloringUploadWeakDevice: This device may process slowly — a smaller photo is recommended.
coloringUploadHeicFailed: We could not open this photo. Save it as JPG from your gallery.
coloringUploadLoadFailed: We could not load this photo.
coloringUploadBadResult: We could not create a good coloring sheet. Try a photo with a simpler background.
coloringUploadEngineFailed: We could not start the processing engine. Try refreshing the page.
coloringUploadPhaseSegment: Separating the subject from the background…
coloringUploadFallbackNotice: The main processing service is unavailable. Creating your sheet an alternate way.
coloringUploadQuotaRemaining: You have {{remaining}} of {{limit}} creations left today.
coloringUploadQuotaUser: You reached the daily limit of 10 coloring sheets. You can create more tomorrow.
coloringUploadQuotaGlobal: The site daily creation quota is full. Please try again tomorrow.
coloringUploadPayloadTooLarge: The photo is too large to process. Try another photo or a smaller crop.
coloringUploadPhaseStyleTransfer: Processing your photo in the selected style…
coloringUploadStyleTransferFailed: We could not create the selected style. Please try again.
coloringUploadStyleTransferTimeout: Processing took too long. Please try again.
coloringUploadStyleTransferUnavailable: Style processing is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
coloringUploadStyleTransferRateLimited: Style processing is busy. Please try again in a few minutes.
